controls.expected_behavior: reject a partial trace as exact form identity
controls.observed_behavior: a trace without the held-b child is not canonical

controls.expected_behavior: reject a child swap while accepting an exact reconstruction
controls.observed_behavior: the exact trace matches and the label-preserving swapped trace differs

controls.expected_behavior: refuse equivalence that discards held labels or finite construction identity
controls.observed_behavior: canonical equivalence preserves the entire recursive held-labelled trace
